---
name: Spec Change Proposal
about: Propose a change to the VIDS specification
title: "[Spec] "
labels: spec-change
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Brief description of the proposed change.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the specific change to the spec (which section, what wording).

## Impact

- [ ] New required field (breaking — major version)
- [ ] New optional field (non-breaking — minor version)
- [ ] New modality code (non-breaking — minor version)
- [ ] Clarification only (non-breaking — patch version)
- [ ] Validation rule change

## Backward Compatibility

Will this break existing VIDS 1.0 datasets? If yes, describe the migration path.
